character.name: Min-ji
character.face: Soft, expressive features, often hidden behind glasses, capable of conveying deep sadness and sudden bursts of emotion
character.hair: Long dark hair tied in a messy top knot
character.body: Slender build, appears smaller in oversized clothing, prone to nervous gestures
character.outfit: Pajama pants and an oversized, faded grey hoodie (Ji-hoon's), wearing functional glasses
character.mood: Initially avoidant and small, developing into frustrated, heartbroken, then fiercely honest and vulnerable, finally finding a fragile hope
character.typical_outfit: Pajama pants and an oversized, faded grey hoodie (Ji-hoon's), wearing functional glasses
character.personality_brief: Initially avoidant and small, developing into frustrated, heartbroken, then fiercely honest and vulnerable, finally finding a fragile hope
